# Preface {.unnumbered}

*Health in Medicine* is an interactive companion to the first-year **nutrition and
metabolism** teaching. It pairs concise didactic material with live diagrams,
self-assessment, and branching **clinical cases** in which you rehearse advising
patients on diet and health.

This pilot demonstrates the integrated study loop — **read → explore → self-test →
rehearse clinical reasoning** — with all progress saved locally in your browser, no
account required.
